items.title: Arrays & Lists
items.description: Lists grow and mutate; tuples are fixed-size records. Pick a tuple when each position has a fixed meaning.

items.title: Dictionaries & Hash Maps
items.description: Tuples of hashables make great compound dict keys (cache keys, edge labels, coordinates).

items.title: Sets
items.description: Tuples can be set elements (`visited.add((node, depth))`); lists cannot.

items.title: collections & dataclasses
items.description: When a tuple's positions deserve names, graduate to a namedtuple or a frozen dataclass.
